title: Decor Essentials Christmas Ribbon 63mm x 10yds Festive Xmas Giftwrap Ribbon Bows Crafts Presents Cake Trim Decor Events (Gold and Red Pickup Truck Presents)
features: SIZES - All ribbons are 63mm wide and are 10 yards long.

CHRISTMAS DESIGNS - Available in 9 stunning designs - Green Pickup Truck with Trees, Red Pickup Truck with Presents, Grey with Red Glitter Berries, Rose Gold with Gold Shimmer Thread, Merry Christmas Red Glitter, Berries Cotton Natural with Red, Merry Christmas Holly Cotton and Merry Christmas Cross Stitch.
VERSATILE - Widely applied for making wreaths, winter ribbons and bows, floral arrangements, Christmas tree decorations, DIY craft projects, holiday gift wrapping and more.
